title: coincidence_matrix_v1 — per-(interval pair) coefficient of coincidence
description: Typed payload for both the relatedness-atlas's `coincidence` Sandler interference map AND the meiosis-atlas's `interchromosomal` page (when stratified by focal_inversion_id + karyotype_at_focal_inv). One row per (chrom, interval_a, interval_b) pair on the same chromosome. c_coincidence = r_ab / (r_a * r_b); the extractor derives c when producer supplies r_a/r_b/r_ab but omits c. Negative rates / C coerce to null. Rows missing chrom / interval_a_id / interval_b_id are dropped at normalize time. C > threshold (default 3.0) is flagged in summary.n_neg_interference_flagged.

c_coincidence.description: r_ab / (r_a * r_b). Extractor derives when producer omits it AND all inputs are present + valid.

n_offspring.description: Sample size used in the rate computation.

karyotype_at_focal_inv.description: Populated when matrix is stratified by karyotype at a focal inversion.

focal_inversion_id.description: The focal inversion under which the matrix is stratified; null for un-stratified rows.

neg_interference_flagged.description: True when c_coincidence > the configured threshold (default 3.0); consumer should highlight in red. Set by the extractor.

mean_c.description: Mean c_coincidence across rows with non-null c. Sanity check: should be < 1 for normal interference.

n_neg_interference_flagged.description: Rows with c_coincidence > threshold (default 3.0); likely artefacts.

neg_interference_threshold.description: Threshold actually applied during this normalize run (echoes params or the default 3.0).
